description_long: This lamppost features a striking design with three large, conical lamp heads arranged in a triangular formation around a central blue metal pole. Each lamp head is made of a translucent, lightly textured material, capped with a dark, opaque top and tapering to a narrow point at the bottom. The lamp heads are supported by curved, metallic arms that extend from the central pole, providing both structural support and a decorative flourish. The base of the pole is circular and robust, suggesting a secure ground mounting. The overall aesthetic is modern and functional, with a hint of industrial style due to the exposed support arms and the use of contrasting materials. The lamppost is likely intended for public spaces such as parks or plazas, where both illumination and visual interest are desired.
description: A modern lamppost with three large, translucent conical lamp heads mounted on a blue central pole, supported by curved metallic arms. The design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three conical lamp heads symmetrically arranged around the central pole, with the support arms clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lamp heads and the curvature of the supporting arms, with two lamp heads more prominently visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the alignment of the lamp heads and the central pole, with the support arms forming a symmetrical pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the staggered arrangement of the lamp heads and the robust blue pole, with the support arms extending outward.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Large, elongated conical lamp heads with translucent textured surfaces and dark caps, supported by curved metallic arms in a modern industrial style.
